---
title: "test_code_sanitizer_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_code_sanitizer_empire.py"
loc: 16
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.10
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.30
---

## Intent
The `test_code_sanitizer_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_validate_syntax, test_repair_syntax, test_sanitize_code, test_classify_error. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_validate_syntax, test_repair_syntax, test_sanitize_code, test_classify_error. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.sentinel.code_sanitizer](file://src.sentinel.code_sanitizer)

### Exports
- `test_validate_syntax`
- `test_repair_syntax`
- `test_sanitize_code`
- `test_classify_error`
